philippines.title: PBA: Macau scores first win with rout of Titan Ultra
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines–Guest team Macau finally produced a breakthrough first victory after blowing out Titan Ultra, 119-107, in the PBA Commissioner’s Cup on Tuesday at Ninoy Aquino Stadium. Jenning Leung sizzled for 32 points, spiked by seven triples and one four-pointer, to lead the Black Knights to the win column after seven consecutive losses to open their participation in the second conference. Making the win special for the squad of coach Marcus Elliott was that it only fielded nine players, while some had to remain in China for various reasons. READ: PBA: Tony Mitchell says Macau flop ‘starts with me’ The […]...
Keep on reading: PBA: Macau scores first win with rout of Titan Ultra

philippines.title: Legarda’s Local Harvest Support Act protects farmers’ livelihoods, ensures food supply
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines – Senator Loren Legarda has filed Senate Bill No. 2051, or the Local Harvest Support Act of 2026, to strengthen food security and protect the livelihoods of farmers and fisherfolk at a time when rising fuel costs and soaring prices of basic goods are pushing rural producers to the brink. “Kapag bumabagsak ang presyo ng ani at huli, ang magsasaka at mangingisda ang unang naaapektuhan. Sa Local Harvest Support Act, sisiguraduhin nating may tiyak na kita sila at may masustansyang pagkain ang bawat pamilya,” Legarda stressed. The measure institutionalizes a “Local First” procurement policy, requiring Local Government Units […]...
Keep on reading: Legarda’s Local Harvest Support Act protects farmers’ livelihoods, ensures food supply

philippines.title: Transport groups strike in Cebu despite fuel rollback, say cuts not enough
philippines.description:
CEBU CITY, Philippines — Transport groups in Cebu joined a nationwide strike despite a recent fuel price rollback, saying it is not enough. Tuesday’s action follows recent fuel price adjustments, including a rollback implemented on April 21, as previously reported. Previous reports also tracked fluctuations in oil prices and weekly fuel movements in Cebu, where transport groups have consistently called for deeper rollbacks and tax relief. Members of Pagkakaisa ng mga Samahan ng Tsuper at Opereytor Nationwide Cebu (PISTON) and allied groups staged protest actions in core areas, including P. del Rosario Street and Colon Street, as part of a […]...
Keep on reading: Transport groups strike in Cebu despite fuel rollback, say cuts not enough

The Labour government is unveiling today measures to better protect households from energy crises, by moving to break link between gas and electricity prices. energy.title: India’s Crude Imports Sink Despite Record Russian Oil Buying
energy.description: India’s total crude oil imports declined by 13% in March from February as the Iran war crippled Middle Eastern supply that couldn’t be offset by record-high Russian oil imports.     India, the world’s third-biggest crude oil buyer, imported a total of 4.5 million barrels per day (bpd) of crude in March, down by 13% from pre-war levels, according to shipping and industry sources' data cited by Reuters. While India’s imports of crude from the Middle East fell materially, imports from Russia surged and almost…
